summary: A recorded Fox News remote interview, posted by the DHS official, shown in a vertical crop. A bearded man in a navy blazer over an open-collar white shirt with an American-flag lapel pin and a clip-on microphone speaks to camera from a remote location, a blurred studio backdrop behind him. Burned-in white captions track his speech and lower-third broadcast chyrons appear, including '...HE ICE AND CBP FUNDIN...' over a red 'BREAKING NEWS' banner and a later chyron reading 'MEMBER ON HOMELAND IN MISSISSIPPI' with a 'MULLIN O...' name graphic. The remarks concern sanctuary cities, detainers, and ICE and CBP funding. The audio is broadcast interview speech.

script.scene: A bearded man in a navy blazer and white shirt with a flag pin speaks to camera; caption 'EVERY SINGLE DAY' over a chyron reading '...HE ICE AND CBP FUNDIN...' and a red BREAKING NEWS banner.
Same man continuing to speak; caption 'MEMBER ON HOMELAND IN MISSISSIPPI'; a Fox News logo and 'MULLIN O...' name graphic appear along the bottom.

notable_text: EVERY SINGLE DAY; THE ICE AND CBP FUNDING; BREAKING NEWS; MEMBER ON HOMELAND IN MISSISSIPPI
